hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(npm|pnpm|yarn|cargo|pytest|make)' && [ -z "$TMUX" ]; then echo '[Hook] WARNING: Consider running inside tmux for session persistence on long commands' >&2; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git push'; then echo '[Hook] Pre-push check: verify tests pass and no console.log statements remain' >&2; grep -rn 'console\.log' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.js' --include='*.jsx' src/ 2>/dev/null && echo 'Found console.log statements — remove before pushing' >&2 || true; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then npx prettier --write "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.(py)$' && [ -f "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" ]; then if grep -n 'console\.log\|print(' "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'logging\|logger'; then echo '[Hook] Possible debug statement detected in modified file' >&2; fi; fi

echo '[Hook] Session ending — auditing for debug statements...' >&2; git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l 'console\.log' 2>/dev/null && echo 'Debug statements found in changed files' >&2 || echo 'No debug statements found' >&2
